nasb.text: Jeroboam did not again recover strength in the days of Abijah; and the Lord struck him and he died.

esv.text: Jeroboam did not recover his power in the days of Abijah. And the Lord struck him down, and he died.

cnv.text: 亞比雅在世的日子，耶羅波安不再強盛。耶和華擊打他，他就死了。

ccb.text: 亚比雅在世之日，耶罗波安再也没有恢复势力。后来，耶和华攻击他，他就死了。
